mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CARD_VERSIONS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CARD_VERSIONS ( card_id, version_no, version_status, snapshot_json, change_summary, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{versionNo}, NVL(#{versionStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DRAFT'), #{snapshotJson}, #{changeSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.update: UPDATE CARD_VERSIONS SET version_status = #{versionStatus}, approved_by = #{approvedBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, approved_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE version_id = #{versionId}
mapper.select: SELECT version_id, card_id, version_no, version_status, change_summary, created_by, created_at, approved_by, approved_at, published_at FROM CARD_VERSIONS WHERE card_id = #{cardId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
